world.title: Apple Stock Falls 1.65% to $275.51 as Tech Rotation and AI Valuation Concerns Hit Mega-Caps
world.description: NEW YORK — Apple Inc. shares declined 1.65 percent to $275.51 in early trading Monday, May 4, 2026, as investors rotated out of high-valuation technology stocks amid broader market caution and questions over artificial intelligence spending returns.
